name: SapS4Hana
description: This Test Connection validates access against the SAP S/4HANA instance and basic metadata extraction of Fiori apps and CDS views.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the SAP S/4HANA instance and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to SAP S/4HANA. Please validate the host, port, and credentials.

steps.name: GetDashboards
steps.description: List Fiori apps available in the SAP S/4HANA Fiori app index.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch Fiori apps. Please validate that the user has access to the Fiori app index.

steps.name: GetDataModels
steps.description: List CDS views available in the SAP S/4HANA instance.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch CDS views. Please validate that the user has access to the CDS view API.
